about.title: About Econojin
about.missionText: Econojin was founded to create an integrated platform for monitoring environmental and green-economy indicators. We believe transparent, reliable data is a prerequisite for any sound decision toward a sustainable future. Our platform helps policymakers, researchers, and citizens see — in real time — how economic decisions affect the environment, and evaluate them.
about.timelineSubtitle: Econojin milestones from the beginning to today
about.joinCommunityText: Create an account to access the full dashboard.

animations.title: Animations
animations.subtitle: Gallery of animation patterns from the Econojin design system — for use across components
animations.spinnerDesc: For loading states. Uses the animate-spin class.
animations.pulseDesc: For elements awaiting data. Uses the animate-pulse class.
animations.bounceDesc: For drawing attention or active indicators. Uses the animate-bounce class.
animations.pingDesc: For notifications and active dots. Uses the animate-ping class.
animations.hoverScaleDesc: For clickable buttons and cards. Try hovering.
animations.hoverLiftDesc: Lift + shadow effect. For interactive cards.
animations.fadeInDesc: For smooth show/hide. Click the button.

usageTips.loading: Use Spinner or Pulse for data loading — not both together.
usageTips.hoverDuration: Hover animations should be short (200–300 ms) to feel natural.
usageTips.cautionBounce: Use Bounce and Ping sparingly — too many disrupt focus.

daneshyar.title: DaneshYar
daneshyar.subtitle: Smart environmental research assistant
daneshyar.section1Body: DaneshYar is a smart assistant that helps environmental researchers analyze data and generate reports quickly.
daneshyar.section2Body: Automated data analysis, report generation, relevant scientific resource suggestions.
daneshyar.section3Body: To use DaneshYar, simply create an account and define your project.

decisionYar.title: DecisionYar
decisionYar.subtitle: Environmental decision support system
decisionYar.section1Body: DecisionYar helps policymakers make better decisions by analyzing environmental data.
decisionYar.section2Body: DecisionYar uses advanced green economy models and life-cycle assessment.
decisionYar.section3Body: DecisionYar outputs are presented as manager-friendly reports.

ecosystemRestoration.section3Body: Project progress reports are published monthly.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What is EcoCoin and how does it work?
faq.a1: EcoCoin is a digital token that rewards users for green behavior. You can earn EcoCoin by reporting environmental data, mining, and completing challenges.
faq.q2: How can I participate in ecosystem restoration projects?
faq.a2: To participate, visit the Ecosystem Restoration page and select a project. Participation can be financial or volunteer-based.
faq.q3: Where does the monitoring data come from?
faq.a3: Data is collected from official monitoring stations, user reports, and satellite imagery.
faq.q4: Is the platform free to use?
faq.a4: Yes, basic platform usage is free. A premium subscription is required for access to specialized reports.
faq.q5: How can I submit an environmental report?
faq.a5: After logging in, go to the Documents page from the dashboard and click the submit report button.
faq.q6: How is my personal data protected?
faq.a6: We use TLS encryption for data transmission and your personal information is never shared without permission.
